candidate.title: Disaggregated prefill and decode for LLM inference on SageMaker HyperPod

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Searched local raw/crawler/nccl-aws-ml-blog, raw manifests, ingest.md, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, and prior parent manifests for SageMaker HyperPod, HyperPod DPD, Disaggregated Prefill and Decode, HyperPod Inference Operator, InferenceEndpointConfig, pdSpec, routingThreshold, LMCache, LMCacheConnectorV1, NIXL, libfabric, EFA, GPU-Direct RDMA, PD_BUFFER_SIZE, kvaware, session, genai-bench, TTFT, TPOT, ml.p5.48xlarge, and ml.p5en.48xlarge.
local_checks.wiki_search: Inference Runtime Infrastructure already covered vLLM, PegaFlow, SGLang disaggregated-prefill issue/PR evidence, NIXL/Mooncake page-level failure handling, Ray Serve, Knative, and CTA-Pipelining arXiv abstract discovery. Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure already covered EFA/libfabric as a fabric boundary, HyperPod training-cluster topology/checkpoint/resiliency evidence, FSx, WEKA, Ceph, SPDK, MLCommons Storage method evidence, and SGLang transfer-control signals. Orchestration Scheduling Infrastructure already covered Ray/KubeRay, Slurm, Kubernetes device plugins, GPU operators, Kubeflow Trainer, Kueue, Volcano, and Kubernetes issue-level scheduling evidence. No curated page represented the AWS ML Blog's SageMaker HyperPod DPD operator/API/runtime/fabric bundle.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: The ai_infra index lists Inference Runtime Infrastructure, Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure, Orchestration Scheduling Infrastructure, Data RAG Pipeline/Vector Infrastructure, Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure, AI Infra Coverage Map, SGLang, NCCL, and compute-accelerator pages. It had no SageMaker HyperPod DPD, HyperPod Inference Operator 3.2, InferenceEndpointConfig pdSpec, or LMCache/NIXL/EFA DPD entry before parent-26.

duplicate_boundaries.result: Duplicate boundary for generic vLLM, PegaFlow external KV cache, SGLang disaggregated-prefill issue/PR signals, and NIXL/Mooncake failure handling; updated only for AWS HyperPod DPD routingThreshold, LMCacheConnectorV1, scaling, observability surface, and AWS-stated benchmark-context evidence.

Duplicate boundary for EFA/libfabric, HyperPod training topology, and SGLang Mooncake/NIXL transfer-control evidence; updated only for source-scoped DPD KV transfer over LMCache PD -> NIXL -> libfabric -> EFA GPU-Direct RDMA, p5/p6 same-AZ, and NVLink deployment boundaries.

Duplicate boundary for Kubernetes/Ray/Slurm/device-plugin/operator scheduling coverage; updated only for HyperPod Inference Operator v3.2, InferenceEndpointConfig spec.pdSpec, prefill/decode/router Deployment creation, and per-role DPD pod semantics.

Not edited. The AWS blog mentions RAG as a long-context workload example but does not prove source-to-vector propagation, deletion, RAG cache invalidation, access-control enforcement, retrieval quality alerting, or data-pipeline cost attribution.

Not edited. The source mentions HyperPod Inference, Tasks, and Cluster Overview dashboards, but it does not include alert thresholds, SLO definitions, trace artifacts, incident/postmortem evidence, or reliability remediation context.

gap_reason: The local corpus already covered generic vLLM serving, external KV-cache concepts, EFA/libfabric, HyperPod training topology, and SGLang page-level disaggregated-prefill/NIXL evidence, but did not represent the July 12 AWS ML Blog's provider-specific SageMaker HyperPod DPD stack: HyperPod Inference Operator 3.2, InferenceEndpointConfig spec.pdSpec, routingThreshold long/short prompt split, vLLM Production Stack router, LMCacheConnectorV1, LMCache PD over NIXL/libfabric/EFA GPU-Direct RDMA, one-prefiller/one-decoder topology, checkpoint-source options, p5/p6 same-AZ deployment constraints, scaling guidance, and AWS-stated genai-bench benchmark boundaries.

promoted_boundaries.coverage: DPD runtime routing, vLLM Production Stack router, LMCacheConnectorV1, long/short prompt threshold behavior, prefiller/decoder semantics, scaling ratios, kvaware/session routing, PD_BUFFER_SIZE guidance, and AWS-stated benchmark-context caveats.
LMCache PD -> NIXL -> libfabric -> EFA GPU-Direct RDMA KV transfer, RDMA-capable EFA, p5/p6, same-AZ high-bandwidth EFA, NVLink, and checkpoint-loading source options as deployment boundary evidence.

HyperPod Inference Operator v3.2, InferenceEndpointConfig spec.pdSpec, separate prefill/decode/router Deployments, per-role replicas/resources/args, shared worker environment variable boundary, readiness and pod/container surfaces.

unpromoted_boundaries: No AWS benchmark percentage or latency/throughput claim is promoted as a local result, MLCommons submission, production SLO, alert threshold, product ranking, or generalized guarantee.
No KServe, SGLang shipped-fix, production rollback/postmortem, exact MLCommons, or end-to-end RAG propagation claim is made from this source.
No accelerator SKU, product catalog row, resolved hardware field, or generalized P5/P6 hardware comparison is created from this blog.
No adjacent AWS Nemotron, AgentCore MCP, NCCL GitHub, NVIDIA GQE/Presto, or vLLM refresh capture is ingested in this parent task.
